parts.description:
An optional visual arrow connecting the popup to its trigger.
Place it inside `rdxMenuPopup`. Positioning is handled by the shared Popper Arrow primitive.

An optional overlay rendered behind the menu popup.
Style it with `position: fixed; inset: 0` and use `data-open` / `data-closed`
for CSS animations.

Renders when the parent checkbox item is checked or indeterminate.
Set `keepMounted` to keep the element in the DOM when unchecked (enables CSS animations).

inputs.name: keepMounted
inputs.description: Keep the indicator in the DOM when unchecked so CSS exit animations can play.

parts.description: A menu item that can be checked or unchecked.

inputs.name: checked
inputs.description: The checked state of the item.

inputs.name: closeOnClick
inputs.description: Whether toggling closes the menu. Defaults to false — checkbox items stay open.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether this item is disabled.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Explicit typeahead label. When set, overrides textContent for character search.

outputs.name: onCheckedChange
outputs.description: Emits before the checked state changes; call `eventDetails.cancel()` to veto it.

parts.description: A label for a menu group.
Groups related menu items together.
An individual menu item.

inputs.name: closeOnClick
inputs.description: Whether selecting this item closes the menu.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether this item is disabled.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Explicit typeahead label. When set, overrides textContent for character search.

outputs.name: onSelect
outputs.description: Emits when the item is selected.

parts.description: A menu item that renders as a link.

inputs.name: closeOnClick
inputs.description: Whether selecting this item closes the menu. Defaults to false — links navigate by default.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether this item is disabled.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Explicit typeahead label. When set, overrides textContent for character search.

outputs.name: onSelect
outputs.description: Emits when the item is selected.

parts.description: A container for the menu contents.

outputs.name: escapeKeyDown
outputs.description: Event handler called when the escape key is pressed. Can be prevented.

outputs.name: focusOutside
outputs.description: Event handler called when focus moves outside of the popup. Can be prevented.

outputs.name: interactOutside
outputs.description: Event handler called when an interaction happens outside of the popup. Can be prevented.

outputs.name: pointerDownOutside
outputs.description: Event handler called when a pointerdown event happens outside of the popup. Can be prevented.

parts.description:
Structural directive that teleports the menu popup into a container (default `document.body`) while
the menu is open, and keeps it mounted until any CSS exit `@keyframes` finishes.

This replaces the consumer-owned `@if (root.open())` mount: it adds both teleporting *and*
exit-animation support. Apply it with the `*` microsyntax on the positioner —
`<div *rdxMenuPortal rdxMenuPositioner>` — or as an explicit `<ng-template rdxMenuPortal>`. For a
custom container, a backdrop alongside the positioner (multi-root), or `[keepMounted]`, use the
explicit form.

Set `[keepMounted]="true"` to keep the popup mounted while the menu is closed (the positioner's
`data-closed` state hides it) — inherited from {@link RdxPortalPresence}.

Dev-mode guard: `rdxMenuPortal` is a structural directive. The old `<div rdxMenuPortal>` markup
would silently stop portaling — fail loudly instead.

Positions the menu against its trigger.

A "thin" positioner (ADR 0012): it inherits the popper positioning surface (inputs, `placed`
output, unified vars + placement attrs) from {@link RdxPopperContentWrapper} and adds the menu
defaults, the open/closed state attributes, and the deprecated `--radix-menu-*` aliases.

inputs.name: align
inputs.description: How to align the popup relative to the specified side. May change when collisions occur.

inputs.name: alignOffset
inputs.description:
An offset in pixels from the `start` or `end` alignment options. Also accepts an
{@link OffsetFunction} (same signature as `sideOffset`).

inputs.name: anchor
inputs.description: An element to position the popup against. Defaults to the popper anchor.

inputs.name: arrowPadding
inputs.description:
Minimum distance to maintain between the arrow and the edges of the popup.
If your content has border-radius, this will prevent it from overflowing the corners.

inputs.name: avoidCollisions
inputs.description:
When `true`, overrides the `side` and `align` preferences to prevent collisions with boundary edges.

`false` disables all avoidance (unless a `collisionAvoidance` object is provided, which wins).

inputs.name: collisionAvoidance
inputs.description:
How the popup avoids colliding with the boundary edges, per axis (Base UI `collisionAvoidance`).
Overrides the deprecated `avoidCollisions` and any per-primitive preset. An object here **fully
replaces** the preset — omitted fields fall back to `side: 'flip'`, `align: 'flip'`,
`fallbackAxisSide: 'end'`, never to the preset. See {@link RdxCollisionAvoidance}.

inputs.name: collisionBoundary
inputs.description:
The element used as the collision boundary.
By default this is the viewport, though you can provide additional element(s) to be included in this check.

inputs.name: collisionPadding
inputs.description:
The distance in pixels from the boundary edges where collision detection should occur.
Accepts a number (same for all sides), or a partial padding object, for example: `{ top: 20, left: 20 }`.

inputs.name: dir
inputs.description:
Text direction, used only to resolve a logical `side` (`inline-start` / `inline-end`) to a
physical one. Falls back to an enclosing direction provider, then `ltr`.

inputs.name: hideWhenDetached
inputs.description: Whether to hide the content when the trigger becomes fully occluded.

inputs.name: positionStrategy
inputs.description: The type of CSS position property to use.

inputs.name: side
inputs.description:
The preferred side of the anchor to render against when open.
Will be reversed when collisions occur and avoidCollisions is enabled.

Accepts the logical `'inline-start'` / `'inline-end'` in addition to the physical sides; those
resolve to `left` / `right` for the text direction (Base UI parity). The placed side reported via
`data-side` / `placedSide()` echoes the requested kind: logical in → logical out (even after a
collision flip), physical in → physical out.

inputs.name: sideOffset
inputs.description:
Distance between the anchor and the popup in pixels. Also accepts an {@link OffsetFunction} that
reads the anchor / positioner dimensions and the resolved side / align.

inputs.name: sticky
inputs.description:
The sticky behavior on the align axis. `partial` will keep the
content in the boundary as long as the trigger is at least partially
in the boundary whilst "always" will keep the content in the boundary
regardless.

inputs.name: updatePositionStrategy
inputs.description: Strategy to update the position of the floating element on every animation frame.

outputs.name: placed
outputs.description: Emits when the element is placed.

parts.description: Groups radio items in a menu.

inputs.name: defaultValue
inputs.description: The initially selected value for uncontrolled usage.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether all radio items in the group are disabled.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The currently selected value.

outputs.name: onValueChange
outputs.description: Emits before the selected value changes; call `eventDetails.cancel()` to veto it.

parts.description:
Renders when the parent radio item is selected.
Set `keepMounted` to keep the element in the DOM when unselected (enables CSS animations).

inputs.name: keepMounted
inputs.description: Keep the indicator in the DOM when unselected so CSS exit animations can play.

parts.description: A radio item within a menu radio group.

inputs.name: closeOnClick
inputs.description: Whether selecting closes the menu. Defaults to false — radio items stay open.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether this item is disabled.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Explicit typeahead label. When set, overrides textContent for character search.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: The value of this radio item.

outputs.name: onSelect
outputs.description: Emits when this item is selected.

parts.description: Groups all parts of a menu.

inputs.name: closeParentOnEsc
inputs.description: Whether pressing Escape inside a submenu closes the whole menu chain.

inputs.name: defaultOpen
inputs.description: Whether the menu is initially open.

inputs.name: dir
inputs.description: Text direction for submenu arrow-key behavior. Inherited by nested submenu roots.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether interactions with the menu are disabled.

inputs.name: highlightItemOnHover
inputs.description: Whether moving the pointer over items should highlight them.

inputs.name: loopFocus
inputs.description: Whether keyboard navigation wraps at list boundaries.

inputs.name: modal
inputs.description:
Whether the menu should block outside interactions and page scrolling.
Nested menus are always non-modal.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Whether the menu is currently open.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: The menu orientation.

outputs.name: onOpenChange
outputs.description: Emits when the open state changes.

outputs.name: onOpenChangeComplete
outputs.description: Emits when the open/close CSS transition or animation finishes.

parts.description: A visual separator between groups of menu items.

inputs.name: orientation
inputs.description: The orientation of the separator. Matches Base UI's `Separator.orientation`.

parts.description:
An item inside a parent menu that opens a nested submenu.

Place this inside `ng-container rdxMenuRoot` that wraps both the trigger
and the submenu positioner. The inner root provides the submenu context;
the outer popup discovers this element via `[rdxMenuSubTrigger]` in its
ITEM_SELECTOR and includes it in keyboard navigation.

inputs.name: closeDelay
inputs.description: Delay before a pending hover close runs, in milliseconds.

inputs.name: delay
inputs.description: Delay before hover opens the submenu, in milliseconds.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether this trigger (and therefore the submenu) is disabled.

inputs.name: label
inputs.description: Explicit typeahead label. When set, overrides textContent for character search.

inputs.name: nativeButton
inputs.description: Whether this trigger should be treated as a native button. Auto-detected for `<button>`.

inputs.name: openOnHover
inputs.description: Whether hovering the trigger opens the submenu.

parts.description: A button that opens the menu.

inputs.name: closeDelay
inputs.description: Delay before hover leave closes the menu, in milliseconds.

inputs.name: delay
inputs.description: Delay before hover opens the menu, in milliseconds.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether this trigger is disabled.

inputs.name: nativeButton
inputs.description: Whether this trigger should be treated as a native button. Auto-detected for `<button>`.

inputs.name: openOnHover
inputs.description: Whether hovering the trigger opens the menu.
